board_csa_architect.notes: Clean scope — UI wrapper around existing CLI logic. No new schema. Bundles naturally with OPS-09/OPS-10. Org 0 guard pattern already proven in admin.ts.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Security model sound. Org 0 check + privilegeGate enforced on all routes. API key never persisted after reveal. Atomic transaction prevents zombie tenants. Sandbox excluded from tenant list.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No AI/VRAM impact. Pure CRUD panel. No new models or inference. Frontend-only addition to existing admin dashboard.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Operationally sound. Replaces CLI-only workflow with dashboard. Reduces bus factor (no SSH needed). Audit logging covers lifecycle actions. 3AM test: panel is read-only at night, no auto-provisioning.

board_red_team.notes: APPROVE WITH CONDITIONS: (1) Verify tenant list query cannot be tricked by RLS bypass — use queryAsAdmin but validate Org 0 in middleware layer. (2) Rate-limit provisioning endpoint to prevent mass-creation abuse. (3) One-time key reveal: ensure key is not returned in subsequent GET responses or cached by browser. Anti-AC additions: MUST NEVER allow more than 10 tenant provisions per hour. MUST NEVER cache API key in browser localStorage/sessionStorage.
